prompt: Create a vertical hero card with a title and body.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", children=hero)
hero = Card(title=:hero.title, body=:hero.body)

prompt: Add a primary call-to-action button under a short text line.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", children=copy)
copy = Text(text=:copy.line)
cta = Button(label=:cta.label)

prompt: Stack two cards vertically for a feature section.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", gap=8, children=a)
a = Card(title=:feat.a.title, body=:feat.a.body)
b = Card(title=:feat.b.title, body=:feat.b.body)

root = Stack(direction="horizontal", gap=4, children=primary)
primary = Button(label=:actions.primary)
secondary = Button(label=:actions.secondary)

prompt: Nested stack with title text, body text, and a button.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", children=title)
title = Text(text=:panel.title)
body = Text(text=:panel.body)
action = Button(label=:panel.action)

prompt: Pricing card with title, body, and subscribe button.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", children=plan)
plan = Card(title=:pricing.title, body=:pricing.body)
subscribe = Button(label=:pricing.cta)

prompt: Page header text above a card.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", children=header)
header = Text(text=:header.title)
main = Card(title=:main.title, body=:main.body)
